notes: Closes the last 🟡 row in design-system-enforcement Requirements Coverage.
Single atomic PR recommended — split causes mid-migration stacking glitches.
Annotate third-party / Radix escape hatches with `// z-escape: <reason>`.

ui.handoff_note: Code migration merged 2026-04-17. Validation ladder green 2026-04-19 (lint/test/build across client+shared, grep returns 0 raw z-[n] literals, toast portal escape hatch documented). Live-browser stacking QA migrated to ops-console-closeout Section 4.

history.details: Scoped as spin-off from design-system-enforcement Step 4 deferral. ~12 files identified (9 client + 3-4 shared). Single atomic PR recommended per Decision 1.

All 13 files migrated (ModalDrawer, DraftDialog, Gardeners, TopNav, SiteHeader, Hero, AppBar, WorkDashboard, Work, OfflineIndicator; ImagePreviewDialog, WorkCard fullscreen, SyncStatusBar, Select). Raw z-[n] literals removed from client and shared. F1/F2/F3/F5 closed.

grep returns 0 raw z-[n] matches in packages/client/src and packages/shared/src/components. `bun run lint` exit 0 (client + shared). `bun run test` exit 0 (client + shared). `VITE_CHAIN_ID=11155111 bun --cwd packages/client run build` exit 0. Toast escape hatch documented: ToastViewport.tsx:7 uses zIndex: 20000 for react-hot-toast portal (semantically topmost — intentional). F4 code evidence accepted; live-browser stacking QA + mobile 375px visual migrated to ops-console-closeout Section 4 (Decision 4 satisfied — agent-doable tail landed before migration).
